trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: The Comments History section contains no customer or staff notes regarding defects, returns, or prior refund requests. Order #000000729 shows Status: Complete, Item shipped (Qty Shipped: 1), Total Paid: $122.48, Total Refunded: $0.00, Order Date: Mar 16, 2025. 
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order View page → Comments History tab; Order Totals section on http://localhost:7780/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/729/ 
WHY IT MATTERS: The critical protocol requires citing specific facts from Comments History or Staff Notes to justify a refund decision. Since there are no notes documenting a defect, RMA, or prior approval, there is insufficient evidence to approve or deny outright. Escalation is required to request defect proof (photos/RMA) or add staff notes before processing a credit memo.
